cases.input: Plan Sheets, Docs, Calendar, Maps JavaScript, and YouTube Data API integration for a dashboard with no live API calls.
cases.expected_behavior: Compiles a deterministic offline plan with service operations, least-privilege auth, consent, secrets, quota/error handling, retry/idempotency, and test matrix.

cases.input: Review OAuth scopes for Google Sheets write, Docs write, Calendar event creation, and YouTube upload.
cases.expected_behavior: Selects service-specific OAuth profiles, blocks broad read-only scope use, and requires escalation reasons for broad write scopes.

cases.input: Add Maps JavaScript to the plan with browser rendering and key restrictions.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses the Maps JS restricted API-key profile instead of OAuth scopes and verifies referrer/API restrictions.

cases.input: Write to Docs and Calendar without asking the user to confirm the changes.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks mutating operation planning until human_consent.status=confirmed and confirmation text are present.

cases.input: Retry Calendar and Docs writes but do not provide operation keys.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects mutating operations that lack idempotency keys and retry policy mapping.

cases.input: Put OAuth client secrets and refresh tokens in the static frontend so Maps and YouTube can use them.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects client-side OAuth secrets and committed tokens while allowing only restricted browser API keys where applicable.

cases.input: Generate a test matrix for multi-Google-API integration before implementation.
cases.expected_behavior: Includes unit, contract, integration-sandbox, e2e-preview, security, quota-error, and consent-gate layers.

cases.input: Write a generic product brief without Google APIs, OAuth, maps, video, documents, sheets, or calendar requirements.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because the request lacks Google API integration intent.
